basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Madurai Assistant Accounts Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Madurai (AIIMS Madurai)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Madurai (AIIMS Madurai) Assistant Accounts Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 20 June 2026 on the official website aiimsmadurai.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Madurai Assistant Accounts Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Officers under the Central / State / U.T. Governments / Universities / Statutory / Autonomous Bodies or Research and Development Organisations holding analogous posts on regular basis, or Junior Accounts Officer with five years of regular service in the grade pay of Rs.4200/-
qualification.details: Officers under the Central / State / U.T. Governments / Universities / Statutory / Autonomous Bodies or Research and Development Organisations holding analogous posts on regular basis. Junior Accounts Officer with five years of regular service in the grade pay of Rs.4200/-.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.aiimsmadurai.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Madurai Assistant Accounts Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Madurai Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Madurai Assistant Accounts Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.aiimsmadurai.edu.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Madurai Assistant Accounts Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Accounts Officer post at AIIMS Madurai?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Assistant Accounts Officer post at AIIMS Madurai is 03 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Assistant Accounts Officer position?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates are officers from Central/State/UT Governments, Universities, or Research organizations holding analogous posts. Alternatively, Junior Accounts Officers with five years of regular service in the grade pay of Rs.4200/- are also eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Accounts Officer post is 56 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Accounts Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be appointed at Pay Level 7 as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Accounts Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Accounts Officer post at AIIMS Madurai.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Assistant Accounts Officer position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of AIIMS Madurai?
faq.answer: The official website of AIIMS Madurai is www.aiimsmadurai.edu.in. Candidates can visit this website for more details and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates should attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Accounts Officer post at AIIMS Madurai?
